name: Shrimp, Herbed and Feta Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 8 ounces angel hair pasta.
2. Prepare 16 ounces salsa, chunky - medium.
3. Peel and uncook 1 1/2 pounds shrimp.
4. Shred 8 ounces Mozzarella, Light cheese.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (°F).
6. Coat bottom and sides of 8-inch X 12-inch baking dish with cooking spray.
7. In a separate bowl, blend Egg Beaters, milk, yogurt, feta cheese, Swiss cheese, parsley, basil, oregano, and garlic.
8. Spread half of pasta over the bottom of the baking dish.
9. Cover with salsa.
10. Add half of shrimp.
11. Spread remaining pasta over shrimp.
12. Add remaining shrimp.
13. Spread egg mixture over all.
14. Bake for 25 minutes.
15. Top with cheese and bake another 10 minutes.
16. Remove from oven and let stand 10 minutes before serving.
Note: If using "real" (not "plastic") cheese, top before placing in the oven initially.
